hero.title_html: A web SCADA platform that reads your PLCs, historises, organises, alerts. And stays open to your tools.
hero.subtitle_html: Wiregrid reads your PLCs over Modbus TCP, OPC-UA and BACnet/IP, archives every measurement, and lets Power BI, Grafana or Excel connect directly. No per-tag licensing. No proprietary connector.
hero.cta_note_html: 7-day trial, no credit card. Public demo without sign-up for a quick look.
hero.preview_label: Live demo · simulated values (real WebSocket push in the actual demo)

app_preview.aria_label: Wiregrid interface preview: live points table
app_preview.title: Live points

personas.title: Four roles. One product.
personas.subtitle: Wiregrid is built for industrial and commercial sites of 50 to 500 points. If your day-to-day looks like one of these four, we should probably talk.

p1.context: You run one or several buildings: factory, head office, logistics site.
p1.pain: Classic supervision platforms charge per tag. With 200 points the budget explodes and your data sleeps in a proprietary format.
p1.fit: Flat annual fee, no per-tag pricing. Your points show up in Power BI without an IT budget request.

p2.context: You install and operate supervision systems for industrial or commercial customers.
p2.pain: Your margins are eaten by vendor licensing. Your customers ask hard questions about data lock-in.
p2.fit: One annual licence covers the whole site. Customers stay owners of their database. You sell expertise, not tags.

p3.context: You track consumption across a site or a fleet, you have to deliver ISO 50001 reports or carbon footprints.
p3.pain: Modbus meters are right there, but pulling them into Power BI requires a connector budget or custom development.
p3.fit: Native Modbus / OPC-UA reads, configurable historian, direct SQL views for your energy dashboards.

p4.context: You consolidate supervision across multiple sites, decide on licence renewals, hold the line on budget and compliance.
p4.pain: Each per-plant licence reaches €10k to €50k a year. Budget is unpredictable, data scattered across vendors, GDPR audit slow at every renewal.
p4.fit: Flat €990/year per site, data in your Postgres, GDPR compliant by design, support within one business day. Source-code audit under NDA available for specific compliance needs. Predictable budget over 5 years.

stats.tag_cost: per tag, no asterisk, no condition

features.title: Five things Wiregrid does, and one it never will.
features.subtitle: Everything below runs in the public demo today. The only piece in progress is the visual wiresheet editor (Q3 2026). The execution engine itself already runs.

acquisition.title: Multi-protocol acquisition
acquisition.desc_html: Native reads over Modbus TCP, OPC-UA and BACnet/IP in a single install. Each driver runs in its own asyncio task, independent polling per device, automatic reconnection. 10 drivers across the 3 protocols in the demo.

historian.title: Historian
historian.desc_html: Every value is written to a TimescaleDB hypertable chunked by day. Per-point on_change with deadband or fixed-interval mode. Configurable retention, time_bucket() queries for downsampling.

alarms.title: Operational alarms
alarms.desc_html: high / low conditions with threshold, deadband and delay. Severities info / warning / critical. Email notifications via user groups. Full event log for traceability.

wiresheet.title: Signal compute & transformation
wiresheet.desc_html: Scale and offset on points, computed points (DeltaT = SupplyTemp − ReturnTemp), visual programmable logic with functional blocks wired together: math, comparison, timer, schedule, latch, ramp, PID. The execution engine already runs. The visual editor lands in Q3 2026.

open_data.title: Direct data access
open_data.desc_html: Power BI, Grafana, Metabase, Excel or psql: ODBC connection without a proprietary connector. Your BI teams build dashboards without waiting for industrial IT.

lifecycle.title: Your sites evolve. Wiregrid evolves with them.
lifecycle.subtitle: A new machine in Building 2, a reorganisation by business function, an event to understand in hindsight. Wiregrid keeps up without breaking what you've already built.

tags.title: Tag once. Find anywhere.
tags.body_html:
Your equipment doesn't live in silos. You tag it once: by site, by building, by business function, by criticality. Then you slice your views however you want: all HVAC equipment, all critical meters, everything in Building B.

When you add a unit to Building B next month, it automatically appears in every view that concerns it, because it carries the right tags. Nothing to reconfigure.

versioning.title: The story of your supervision, in plain sight.
versioning.body_html:
Every change (a threshold adjusted, a machine renamed, a new alarm wired) leaves a trace. You see who did what, when. You can review your supervision as it was 6 months ago to understand a past event.

You can also undo a change in one click. No backup file to reload, no data loss since.

pricing.title: Three doors. One paid tier.
pricing.subtitle: The online demo for a quick look. The 7-day trial to wire up your real PLCs. The Standard tier when you go to production. No per-tag pricing, no hidden runtime licence.
pricing.footnote: Standard: prices excl. VAT, billed annually, renews at €990/year. You stay the owner of your data and your instance, hosted on your infrastructure.

faq.title: The questions we get.
faq.subtitle: If yours isn't here, drop us a line at contact@wiregrid.fr. Reply within one business day.

compatible_plc.q: Compatible with my Schneider M340 / Siemens S7-1500 / other PLC?
compatible_plc.a_html: If your PLC speaks Modbus TCP, OPC-UA or BACnet/IP, yes. For Modbus RTU over serial, plan a TCP gateway. See the Capabilities section.

data_format.q: What format is the data stored in?
data_format.a_html: Configuration: standard PostgreSQL tables. History: TimescaleDB hypertable point_history(ts, point_id, value, quality), chunked by day. Everything queryable in plain SQL, no proprietary dialect.

powerbi.q: How do I connect Power BI?
powerbi.a_html: Power BI Desktop > Get Data > PostgreSQL. You enter your Wiregrid server's IP, a read-only user, and you see the tables. No proprietary connector to install.

self_host.a_html: Self-hosted. Your data never leaves your network. The online demo runs on a public environment but it's a demo, not a production offer.

minimum_hardware.a_html: 2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM, 20 GB disk are enough for ~500 points with 30 days of history. Runs on an industrial mini-PC, a Raspberry Pi 4 or a €5/month VPS.

security.a_html: JWT auth (UI) or API key (integrations). Postgres and Redis bind to localhost, never exposed. Behind a reverse-proxy (Caddy, Nginx, Cloudflare Tunnel) you get automatic TLS.

safety_sil.q: Can I run functional safety (SIL) on it?
safety_sil.a_html: No, and never will. Wiregrid supervises and historises. Your safety interlocks must stay in your certified PLC.

company_disappears.q: What if you shut down tomorrow?
company_disappears.a_html: Fair question, and the main reason Wiregrid stores everything in standard SQL. Concretely: your postgres runs on your server. Your Power BI dashboards keep working. For acquisition, you replace Wiregrid with any other platform speaking Modbus / OPC-UA / BACnet.

multi_site.a_html: Today: multi-project on a single instance, ideal for multi-building setups within one group. Distant multi-site with edge gateways and a consolidating central: Q4 2026 roadmap.

wiresheet_status.q: When does the wiresheet (visual logic) ship?
wiresheet_status.a_html: The execution engine is already in the runtime. The Vue Flow editor (block palette, drag-drop, links) is targeted for Q3 2026. In the meantime, scale/offset and simple computed points are configurable in the UI.

support.a_html: Discovery plan: public documentation + best-effort email to contact@wiregrid.fr. Production plan: email with a 1-business-day response SLA, video calls on request, direct access to the lead developer.

trial.q: How long do I need to seriously try it?
trial.a_html: Three doors depending on your need. The online demo works as an instant POC (60 seconds of clicking around). The 7-day trial gives you the full app on your infra, with your PLCs, to validate in real conditions. Beyond that, you switch to a yearly Standard licence (€990).

demo_vs_trial.q: What's the difference between the online demo and the 7-day trial?
demo_vs_trial.a_html: The online demo is public, runs on our server with simulated industrial-site data. You click around, see the UI, close the tab. No sign-up, nothing to install. Best for a first look. The 7-day trial, on the other hand, gives you the full app on your own infrastructure. You fill a form, receive a license.jwt and a docker-compose.yml by email, run docker compose up -d on your server, wire up your real PLCs. That's the serious evaluation before purchase.

trial_what_happens.a_html: You fill the form on /en/trial/. You immediately receive an email with your license.jwt, a ready-to-use docker-compose.yml, and the install command. You run docker compose up -d on your server, wire up your PLCs, explore. No credit card, no auto-renewal, no extra account on top.

trial_end.q: What happens to my install when the 7 days are up?
trial_end.a_html: The app switches to read-only. You keep access to your historised data, you can export your configuration and historian. Writes (adding a point, editing an alarm, deploying a revision) are blocked until you activate a production licence. Nothing is deleted, nothing is volatile. To extend, write to contact@wiregrid.fr.

final_cta.title: Two ways to test. At your own pace.
final_cta.subtitle: 60 seconds on the live demo to make up your mind. 7 days on your infra with your PLCs to validate seriously. No sign-up, no credit card.

form.error_dedupe: A licence has already been issued for this address in the last 30 days. Check your inbox (spam included) or write to contact@wiregrid.fr.

disclaimer.limits_html: Trial licence limits: 5 drivers, 15 machines, 500 points, full feature set (acquisition, historian, alarms, wiresheet, SQL access).
disclaimer.duration_html: Duration: 7 days from issuance. On expiration, the app switches to read-only: your data stays yours, export remains available.
disclaimer.no_card_html: No credit card. No auto-renewal. No automated marketing emails beyond the trial follow-up.

what_next.title: What happens next
what_next.step_1_html: Immediately: email with license.jwt, docker-compose.yml and the install command.
what_next.step_2_html: Day 6: reminder 24 hours before expiration, with a Calendly link if you want to chat.
what_next.step_3_html: Day 7: post-trial check-in. Move to production or not, your call.

success.title: Check your inbox
success.body_html: We sent an email to {email} with your licence and the install command. If nothing arrives within 5 minutes (spam included), write to contact@wiregrid.fr.
